module.name: overview
module.purpose: Defines source design documents, repository snapshots, file changes, and star-map graph data used by the overview UI.

files.purpose: Module exports for overview data types.

items.name: design
items.details: Structured design JSON model used by the overview module and frontend property panel.
items.code: mod design;

items.name: source_map
items.details: Repository snapshot and file-level source change model.
items.code: mod source_map;

items.name: star_map
items.details: Module graph and star-map visualization model.
items.code: mod star_map;

items.name: overview public surface
items.details: Re-exports design, source-map, and star-map data models.

files.purpose: Defines the structured `.design.json` schema consumed by overview and star-map UI.

items.name: DesignDocument
items.details: Top-level design document for a source module folder.
items.code:
pub struct DesignDocument {
    #[serde(rename = "schemaVersion")]
    pub schema_version: u32,
    pub module: DesignModule,
    #[serde(rename = "childModules")]
    pub child_modules: Vec<DesignChildModule>,
    #[serde(default, rename = "exposedGroups")]
    pub exposed_groups: Vec<DesignExposedGroup>,
    pub files: Vec<DesignFile>,
    #[serde(rename = "starMap")]
    pub star_map: DesignStarMap,
}

items.name: DesignModule
items.details: Module path, name, and purpose metadata.
items.code:
pub struct DesignModule {
    pub path: String,
    pub name: String,
    pub purpose: String,
    #[serde(default, rename = "changeStatus")]
    pub change_status: Option<String>,
}

items.name: DesignChildModule
items.details: Direct child module metadata.
items.code:
pub struct DesignChildModule {
    pub path: String,
    pub name: String,
    pub purpose: String,
    #[serde(default, rename = "changeStatus")]
    pub change_status: Option<String>,
}

items.name: DesignFile
items.details: Source file purpose plus all extracted design items.
items.code:
pub struct DesignFile {
    pub path: String,
    pub purpose: String,
    #[serde(default, rename = "changeStatus")]
    pub change_status: Option<String>,
    pub items: Vec<DesignItem>,
}

items.name: DesignItem
items.details: Interface, implementation, data definition, function, trait, struct, enum, impl block, module, or type alias entry.
items.code:
pub struct DesignItem {
    pub kind: String,
    pub name: String,
    pub category: DesignItemCategory,
    pub signature: String,
    pub details: String,
    #[serde(default)]
    pub code: Option<String>,
    #[serde(default)]
    pub language: Option<String>,
    #[serde(default, rename = "lineStart")]
    pub line_start: Option<u32>,
    #[serde(default, rename = "lineEnd")]
    pub line_end: Option<u32>,
    pub implements: Vec<String>,
}

items.name: DesignItemCategory
items.details: Classifies design items as interface, implementation, data, or module.

items.name: DesignStarMap
items.details: Display notes for the star-map property panel.

files.purpose: Defines repository snapshot and file-level change sections.

items.name: RepositorySnapshot
items.details: Root path, source files, and file changes for a repository snapshot.

items.name: SourceFile
items.details: Path, module path, and source language metadata.

items.name: SourceLanguage
items.details: Language classification for source files.
items.code:
pub enum SourceLanguage {
    Rust,
    Python,
    Markdown,
    Web,
    Config,
    Unknown,
}

items.name: FileChange
items.details: File path, change status, and change sections.

items.name: ChangeSection
items.details: Line range and changed lines for one diff section.

items.name: ChangeLine
items.details: One context, added, or deleted line.

items.name: ChangeLineKind
items.details: Classifies a change line as context, added, or deleted.

files.purpose: Defines module graph, interface summaries, data store summaries, and star-map provider contract.

items.name: StarMapProvider
items.details: Builds star-map data from input.

items.name: ModuleId
items.details: Stable module node identifier.
items.code: pub struct ModuleId(pub String);

items.name: StarMapInput
items.details: Input options for star-map generation.

items.name: StarMap
items.details: Root node, edges, and metadata for a star map.

items.name: ModuleNode
items.details: Primary data object for each star-map node.
items.code:
pub struct ModuleNode {
    pub id: ModuleId,
    pub name: String,
    pub path: String,
    pub kind: ModuleKind,
    pub status: ChangeStatus,
    pub children: Vec<ModuleNode>,
    pub interfaces: Vec<InterfaceSummary>,
    pub data_stores: Vec<DataStoreSummary>,
    pub files: Vec<String>,
    pub layout: NodeLayoutHint,
}

items.name: InterfaceSummary
items.details: Interface metadata shown in the property panel.

items.name: DataStoreSummary
items.details: Data storage metadata shown in the property panel.

items.name: NodeLayoutHint
items.details: Layout guidance for frontend map rendering.

items.name: ModuleKind
items.details: Enum set for module classification, change state, interface kind, storage kind, edge kind, and star-map errors.
items.code:
pub enum ModuleKind {
    Root,
    Directory,
    RustCrate,
    RustModule,
    PythonPackage,
    WebAssetGroup,
}

items.name: ChangeStatus
items.details: Enum set for module classification, change state, interface kind, storage kind, edge kind, and star-map errors.
items.code:
pub enum ChangeStatus {
    Unchanged,
    Added,
    Modified,
    Deleted,
    Renamed,
}

items.name: InterfaceKind
items.details: Enum set for module classification, change state, interface kind, storage kind, edge kind, and star-map errors.
items.code:
pub enum InterfaceKind {
    Trait,
    Struct,
    Enum,
    Function,
    Module,
}

items.name: DataStoreKind
items.details: Enum set for module classification, change state, interface kind, storage kind, edge kind, and star-map errors.

items.name: ModuleEdgeKind
items.details: Enum set for module classification, change state, interface kind, storage kind, edge kind, and star-map errors.

items.name: StarMapError
items.details: Enum set for module classification, change state, interface kind, storage kind, edge kind, and star-map errors.

notes: ModuleNode is the primary data object for each star-map node.
InterfaceSummary and DataStoreSummary support the property panel but display content should come from `.design.json`.
DesignDocument is the structured source of truth for module and file details.

exposedGroups.name: Data Definitions
exposedGroups.purpose: Public data types, structures, enums, and global values.
